name: JAMAICAN PATTIES STUFFED with MAQUE CHOUX

ingredients.item: 2 cups whole wheat pastry flour, chilled
ingredients.original: 2 cups whole wheat pastry flour, chilled

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon plus ¾ teaspoon ice water
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon plus ¾ teaspoon ice water

ingredients.item: ½ cup finely diced red onion
ingredients.original: ½ cup finely diced red onion

ingredients.item: ¼ cup finely diced green bell pepper
ingredients.original: ¼ cup finely diced green bell pepper

ingredients.item: ½ teaspoon minced seeded habanero chile
ingredients.original: ½ teaspoon minced seeded habanero chile

ingredients.item: ½ teaspoon cumin seeds, toasted and ground
ingredients.original: ½ teaspoon cumin seeds, toasted and ground

ingredients.item: ½ teaspoon allspice berries, toasted and ground
ingredients.original: ½ teaspoon allspice berries, toasted and ground

ingredients.item: 1¼ cups sweet corn kernels (from about 2 ears of corn; store the cobs in the freezer to make Corn Broth)
ingredients.original: 1¼ cups sweet corn kernels (from about 2 ears of corn; store the cobs in the freezer to make Corn Broth)

ingredients.item: ½ cup peeled, seeded, and finely diced firm heirloom tomato
ingredients.original: ½ cup peeled, seeded, and finely diced firm heirloom tomato

ingredients.item: ½ teaspoon freshly squeezed lime juice
ingredients.original: ½ teaspoon freshly squeezed lime juice
